raw_text: Worst app. where is my promo code. First delivery damage item and after returning send promo code. Now I am unable to use my promo code. No option visible. I want to raise the issue but every time I return back to the main menu.

could have reduced the extra fee. unlike zepto, blinkit is a little expensive. but, there are products available most of the time. in many other apps, some products are mostly out of stock. so, blinkit is a saver.

for timing it deserves appreciation..but just today while searching for products such as facewash..I noticed almost none of the products' ingredients were listed. That's very unfair trade practice... that's a sussss.....lack of transparency

Amazing app for grocery savings but doesnt have a return policy other than returning at the door; we dont actually know what is inside the packages, So return policy at door doesnt make much sense. BB takes returns upto 48hrs, Flipkart too. So I am uninstalling this app, as there are other Quick commerce apps that are using sensible return policies and methods. update: i received an expired coffee, a delivery executive was sent to pickup the packet and he wouldn't take it back as it was open.

its very cool app btw all order are on time and good quality of eating product bcz I am only used for eating item I can say about that herelectronics and beauty products. but it's fantastic and delivered in only 15 to 20 mins but1problem is there are handling charge and also below 200 it's get ₹30charge its very cool app btw all order are on time and good quality of eating product bcz I am only used for eating item I can say about that her electronics and beauty products.but it's fantastic app

I am extremely dissatisfied with the way this issue has been handled. The products delivered in my order were damaged, and I immediately raised a complaint requesting a refund. Your delivery partner collected the damaged items, yet I have still not received my refund.What is completely unacceptable is that there has not been a single update regarding the status of my refund. I have been left waiting without any communication, which reflects very poor customer service.I returned the damaged produ

Blinkit money glitch : not working does it require any changes in setting. like old age mobile apps. - I'm riding part time in blinkit but when I try to place order using this customer app it's not allowing to place order. at payment option it shows restrictions in all types of payment. Even tried to place order to my friends home, office, etc but no use. not allowing to use my blinkit money.

Excellent service! My order was delivered on time. All the items were fresh and neatly packed. The delivery was quick, and the overall experience was excellent. Highly recommended. Will definitely order again!"

Some delivery executives are engaging in fraudulent practices. They are providing false reasons, such as claiming they couldn't find the address or that the customer's phone was unreachable, even when that isn't true.

First of all, I would like to point out that many products available on your app are significantly overpriced. Items that are available in the local market for around ₹20 are often listed on your platform for nearly ₹100. This pricing difference does not provide a good experience for customers and raises concerns about value for money. Secondly, the delivery time estimates shown on the app are often inaccurate

my order was not delivered but showing as delivered. Agent number not reachable. support number says out of stock items. I will send the itemes in stock. Terrible system. You people wanted time and peac of mind for few minutes. we use these services only if anything is urgently required and we cannot go out. Your system takes time in wasting our time in contacting chatting.

very bad experience with blinkit. it's app is hanging. I am extremely disappointed with Blinkit's return policy and customer support. I received a product that did not meet expectations, but the return request was rejected without a satisfactory explanation. The return policy seems heavily tilted against customers and offers very little flexibility, even in genuine cases. As a regular online shopper, I expect fair customer service and reasonable support when issues arise.

horrible app.they deliver product with missing item,and then dont replace the item .stating from our end it was delivered in proper condition. why will I deliberately say item is missing .they have started cheating custmer

keeps adding the time In the top. not useful. says under 10 minutes and stops it at 5 for around 15 minutes. then says driver came under time. not sure but they seem to have made a space Time bending tech that causes themselves to reach early.

Blinkit is one of the most useful apps I've used. Fast deliveries, a smooth app experience, and reliable service make daily life much easier. I also appreciate the hardworking delivery partners who ensure orders arrive on time. It's inspiring to see Blinkit expand into services like ambulance booking, showing they care about more than convenience. Keep up the amazing work—you're making a real difference!
payment is never successful on the first try, always have to pay twice for any order to get placed. The refund comes almost instantly, but it's a nuisance having to place every order twice.

The deliverymen are useless and can't locate the place despite providing proper address & directions;I had to leave my utmost important work at the office & come to collect the goods;to top it off, they don't carry change even when I use 'cash on delivery' option.

Delivery system is good. But support system is almost nil. This platform owns no responsibility of the quality of items it delivers. Once the item is delivered, the poor customer is left to his /her own fate. I sincerely recommend to all my co-customers not to think of purchasing anything from Blinkit. I too regret choosing this platform for shopping. They have no customer care phone no. on which the customer can talk to the support executive.

It is very expensive 😪 and stationery item are not able. It is not to good in stationery 🙄🙄 it is getting nice I mean I liking it nice app 😊😊 but still stationery items r expensive and most r not available and the Japanese thin tip pen is not available in blue gel but it's ok nick app

Very Bad experience of support, they have supplied the charging cable and it is not working. No method for replacement is there in the app. When I went to the Blinkit store then they were saying they couldn't replace even 7 days of replacement is available for the product. The support team is not connecting on the chat and I have been trying for 2 days but no response and there is no path to connect with the support team. Delivering faster is not enough. Have some sense of support also.
